title: agalma tomentosum
intro: Agalma tomentosum, also known as the woolly agalma, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Agalma tomentosum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Agalma tomentosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
